Security policy: 30-minute timeout

U.S. Department of War Information System

You are accessing a U.S. Government (USG) Information System (IS) that is provided for USG-authorized use only.

By using this IS (which includes any device attached to this IS), you consent to the following conditions:

  • The USG routinely intercepts and monitors communications on this IS for purposes including, but not limited to, penetration testing, COMSEC monitoring, network operations and defense, personnel misconduct (PM), law enforcement (LE), and counterintelligence (CI) investigations.
  • At any time, the USG may inspect and seize data stored on this IS.
  • Communications using, or data stored on, this IS are not private, are subject to routine monitoring, interception, and search, and may be disclosed or used for any USG-authorized purpose.
  • This IS includes security measures (e.g., authentication and access controls) to protect USG interests — not for your personal benefit or privacy.

Notwithstanding the above, using this IS does not constitute consent to PM, LE, or CI investigative searching or monitoring of the content of privileged communications.

By clicking "I Accept" you acknowledge and consent to the terms above.

S4 Ledger Platform

The integrity layer for defense logistics. Track every part, verify every handoff, and prove compliance — instantly.

XRPL Mainnet Connected — Navy Record Types • 54+ Pre-Built Templates

The Complete Defense Logistics Toolkit

23+ integrated tools for anchoring, verifying, and managing Navy logistics records on the XRP Ledger. Built by ILS professionals, for ILS professionals.

Anchor & Verify

Hash any defense record with SHA-256 and anchor the fingerprint to the XRP Ledger. Verify integrity at any time.

Anchor-S4

Gap analysis, DMSMS tracking, readiness scoring, lifecycle cost estimation, compliance scorecards, acquisition planning, and 15+ more tools.

Audit & Compliance

CMMC, NIST 800-171, DFARS — automated compliance scoring with blockchain-anchored evidence.

AI-Powered Analysis

Supply chain risk engine, predictive maintenance AI, and a conversational agent for ILS guidance.

Defense Data Import

Import from DPAS, OARS, OMMS-NG, DECKPLATE, and other Navy systems. 500+ defense platforms database.

Contract & Config Mgmt

Track warranties, CDRL deliverables, contract modifications, and engineering change proposals.

Verify & Anchor Records

Verify Records

Upload or paste the original record to verify its hash matches what was anchored on XRPL.

How It Works

The Verify Records tool lets you prove that any document or data has not been tampered with since it was anchored to the blockchain.

  1. Upload or paste — Drop any file or paste text content. S4 computes the SHA-256 hash entirely in your browser — the file never leaves your device.
  2. Compare hashes — S4 checks the computed hash against all records anchored in your vault and on the XRPL ledger.
  3. Get proof — If the hash matches, the record is verified as unaltered. S4 shows the original anchor timestamp, XRPL transaction ID, and explorer link.
  4. Batch verify — Upload multiple files at once. S4 verifies each file independently and reports results in a summary table.

How S4 saves you money: Traditional document verification requires notaries, legal review, and manual chain-of-custody checks costing $50-$500 per document. S4 verifies any file in under 3 seconds for free — saving $250,000+/year across large programs with hundreds of auditable records.

Drop file(s) here to verify integrity
PDF, Excel, Word, CSV, JSON, images, contracts — any file type
The file is hashed locally — never uploaded to any server
or paste text

Verification Use Cases

Supply Chain: Confirm parts receipt hasn't been altered
CDRL: Verify contractor delivered exact document version
Maintenance: Prove 3-M actions logged as-performed
Ordnance: Validate lot tracking since manufacture
Config: Confirm system baseline hasn't drifted
Audit: Demonstrate tamper-proof trail to inspectors

Recently Anchored Records

Click any record to auto-fill its hash for verification.

No anchored records yet. Anchor a record first to see it here.
or anchor new records

Anchor a Record

How It Works

The Anchor tool writes an immutable, timestamped proof of any defense record to the XRP Ledger — creating a tamper-proof audit trail.

  1. Select branch & type — Choose your military branch and record type (maintenance logs, supply receipts, CDRLs, ordnance tracking, etc.).
  2. Paste or upload — Enter record content or upload a file. S4 generates a SHA-256 hash locally — data never leaves your browser.
  3. Anchor to XRPL — S4 writes the hash as a Memo in a real XRPL transaction on Mainnet. Cost: 0.01 Credits per anchor (~$0.0001).
  4. Get proof — Receive a live XRPL transaction ID, explorer link, and timestamp. The record is now independently verifiable by anyone, forever.

How S4 saves you money: Traditional notarization and certification costs $50-$200 per record with turnarounds of days or weeks. S4 anchors any record in under 4 seconds at $0.0001 each — replacing $50,000+ annually in notary and records certification costs per program.

Drag & drop a file here or click to browse
PDF, Excel, Word, CSV, JSON, TXT — any file type
Try a sample: Supply Receipt 3-M Maint Ordnance Lot CASREP Custody Transfer

Anchor Flow

1. Select branch & record type
2. Enter or paste record content
3. Optional: encrypt for CUI protection
4. SHA-256 hash computed client-side
5. Hash anchored to XRPL memo field
6. $SLS micro-fee (0.01) paid to treasury
7. Record appears in Live Metrics dashboard

What Gets Stored On-Chain

Only the SHA-256 hash of your record is stored on the XRP Ledger. No classified data, CUI, ITAR-controlled, or sensitive content ever touches the blockchain.

Transaction Log

Transaction Log

All records anchored in this session.

How It Works

The Transaction Log is your complete, real-time audit trail — every record anchored in this session with full XRPL verification.

  1. Automatic logging — Every anchor operation (from any tool) is recorded here with timestamp, hash, record type, and XRPL transaction ID.
  2. Verify on-chain — Click any transaction to open the XRPL Explorer and independently verify the record exists on the live ledger.
  3. Filter & search — Find records by type, program, date, or hash. Audit-ready in seconds, not days.
  4. Export for audits — Download the full log as CSV for compliance reviews, IG inspections, or DCMA audits.

How S4 saves you money: Manual audit trail assembly takes 3-5 days per review at $150/hr. S4 provides instant, blockchain-verified logs — reducing audit prep from $3,600-$6,000 to under 10 seconds. Across quarterly audits for 10 programs: $144,000-$240,000/year in savings.

No records anchored yet. Go to the Anchor tab to start.
Systems

Systems

Platform health, performance metrics, and offline queue management.

Metrics Dashboard
Real-time XRPL transaction metrics, anchor success rates, and platform performance monitoring.
Offline Queue
Encrypted offline queue with auto-sync, exponential backoff, and persistent storage for network outages.
Systems / Metrics

Performance Metrics Dashboard

Real-time platform performance, anchoring metrics, and system health.

How It Works

The Metrics Dashboard gives you real-time visibility into platform performance, anchoring throughput, and system health — so you always know S4 is running at peak.

  1. Anchor performance — Track average anchor time, success rate, and daily volume. S4 targets sub-4-second anchoring on XRPL Mainnet.
  2. Platform health — Monitor API response times, hash generation speed, TX signing, and vault save operations with P50/P95 breakdowns.
  3. Usage tracking — See total records generated, vault size, and credit consumption across your team and programs.
  4. Refresh anytime — Hit Refresh Metrics to pull the latest data. All metrics are computed from your actual anchoring activity.

How S4 saves you money: Without platform metrics, performance issues go undetected for weeks — causing failed anchors, missed SLAs, and audit gaps. S4 Metrics provides instant visibility that prevents $50,000+/year in rework from undetected system issues and ensures 99.9% anchoring reliability.

Systems / Offline Queue

Offline Queue & Batch Sync

Manage hashes queued during offline/air-gapped operation. Batch sync when connected.

How It Works

The Offline Queue ensures zero data loss in air-gapped, SCIF, or austere environments — S4 keeps working even without connectivity.

  1. Automatic queuing — When offline, S4 detects the loss of connectivity and queues all anchor operations locally with encrypted storage.
  2. Persistent storage — Queued hashes survive browser restarts and are encrypted at rest. No data is lost.
  3. Auto-sync — When connectivity returns, queued operations sync automatically to XRPL with exponential backoff retry logic.
  4. Manual control — View queue contents, trigger manual sync, or queue vault records directly. Clear the queue when done.

How S4 saves you money: In deployed or air-gapped environments, lost records cost $10,000-$100,000 per incident in re-inspection and re-certification. S4 Offline Queue ensures zero data loss — saving $500,000+/year across programs operating in austere or SCIF environments.

Connection Status
Online
Queued Hashes
0
Last Sync
Never
Queue Contents
Queue is empty. Hashes are queued automatically when offline.

Team Manager

Milestone Monitor

Helpful?

Gap Finder

Upload your DRLs, spreadsheets, checklists, and documents. The analyzer will parse them, cross-reference against program requirements, and identify gaps, missing deliverables, and actionable items.

How It Works

The Gap Finder scans your program data against GEIA-STD-0007 requirements and identifies critical gaps in 12 logistics elements.

  1. Select your program — Choose from pre-loaded defense platforms or add a custom program.
  2. Upload or auto-scan — ILS data files (CDRLs, tech manuals, provisioning docs) are analyzed automatically.
  3. Review gap scores — Each of the 12 ILS elements receives a readiness score (0-100%). Programs scoring below 70% are flagged critical.
  4. Get action items — S4 generates prioritized corrective actions with cost estimates and timelines.
  5. Anchor results — Lock your analysis to the XRPL ledger for immutable audit proof.

How S4 saves you money: Manual ILS gap analysis takes 40-80 hours per program at $150/hr ($6,000-$12,000). S4 completes the same analysis in under 5 minutes — saving 65% on labor costs and reducing gap identification errors by 90%. Across 10 programs, that is $60,000-$120,000/year in savings.

Drag & drop files here or click to browse
Accepts .csv, .xlsx, .xls, .pdf, .docx, .txt — all processing done locally in your browser
Supports 23+ document types — DRL, LCSP, IUID, VRS, IMS, CDRL & more

ILS Readiness Score

Action Calendar

No action items yet. Use the tools above to generate actionable tasks and recommendations.

AI Recommendations

Ask the S4 Agent about your action items, priorities, risks, and next steps.

How It Works

Task Prioritizer tracks every corrective action, risk mitigation, and follow-up task across all your programs in one place.

  1. Auto-generated actions — When ILS analysis finds gaps, action items are created automatically with priority, owner, and due date.
  2. Manual items — Add custom action items for any tool (readiness, compliance, risk, etc.).
  3. Track status — Open, In Progress, Completed, or Overdue. Filter by source, priority, or program.
  4. Export & anchor — Export action lists to CSV or anchor completed actions to the ledger for audit proof.

How S4 saves you money: Missed action items cause program delays averaging $50,000-$500,000 per incident. S4 tracking reduces missed actions by 85% and cuts follow-up coordination time by 70% — saving 15-20 hours/week in program management overhead.

Tip: The agent uses data from all tools — ILS analysis, DMSMS, Readiness, Parts, ROI, Lifecycle, and Warranty — to provide contextual recommendations.

Actions by Source

Run tools to see breakdown.

Obsolescence Alert

Track Diminishing Manufacturing Sources and Material Shortages (DMSMS). Identify parts at risk of obsolescence, find alternates, and estimate resolution costs. Per DoDI 4245.14.

How It Works

DMSMS (Diminishing Manufacturing Sources and Material Shortages) monitoring tracks component obsolescence risk across your fleet.

  1. Select program & system — Choose the platform and subsystem to analyze.
  2. View obsolescence risk — Components are scored by lifecycle status: Active, At Risk, End of Life, or Obsolete.
  3. Alternative sourcing — S4 identifies form-fit-function replacements and qualified substitutes.
  4. Cost impact analysis — See the projected cost of each obsolescence case: redesign ($250K-$2M), last-time buy ($50K-$500K), or substitute ($10K-$100K).
  5. Anchor findings — Lock DMSMS assessments to the ledger for compliance proof.

How S4 saves you money: Unplanned obsolescence causes emergency redesigns costing $250K-$2M each. S4 early detection reduces DMSMS costs by 40-60% through proactive last-time buys and planned substitutions — saving an average of $1.2M per program over its lifecycle.

Drag & drop DMSMS files or click to browse
Accepts .csv, .xlsx, .xls, .pdf, .docx, .txt — identifies NSNs, CAGE codes, part statuses
0
Parts Tracked
0
At Risk
0
Resolved
$0
Est. Resolution Cost

Readiness Score

Calculate Operational Availability (Ao), Mean Time Between Failures (MTBF), Mean Time To Repair (MTTR), and Mean Logistics Delay Time (MLDT). Per MIL-STD-1390D and DoDI 5000.02.

How It Works

The Readiness Score computes Operational Availability (Ao), Inherent Availability (Ai), and mission reliability per MIL-STD-1390D.

  1. Enter MTBF — Mean Time Between Failures in hours (e.g., 2,400 hrs for radar systems).
  2. Enter MTTR — Mean Time To Repair in hours (e.g., 4.5 hrs with trained personnel).
  3. Enter MLDT — Mean Logistics Delay Time in hours (e.g., 24 hrs for spares delivery).
  4. View results — Ao = MTBF/(MTBF+MTTR+MLDT). Target: Ao > 90% for most DoD programs.
  5. Assessment bands — EXCELLENT (>95%), MEETS (>90%), MARGINAL (80-90%), BELOW (70-80%), CRITICAL (<70%).

How S4 saves you money: Every 1% increase in Ao reduces annual maintenance costs by approximately $50,000-$200,000 per platform. S4 MLDT optimization recommendations typically improve Ao by 3-8%, saving $150,000-$1.6M annually through reduced downtime, fewer emergency spares orders, and optimized depot scheduling.

—
Ao
—
Ai
—
Failure Rate (λ)
—
Mission Readiness

ROI Calculator

Calculate the return on investment from implementing S4 Ledger across your ILS, DMSMS, and readiness programs. Compare manual processes vs. automated blockchain-backed document management.

How It Works

The ROI Calculator quantifies your exact savings from S4 Ledger across labor, errors, and audit costs.

  1. Enter programs managed — Number of active defense programs (e.g., 5-50).
  2. Enter ILS FTEs — Full-time equivalent logistics staff (e.g., 3-20).
  3. Enter labor rate — Average hourly rate including overhead (e.g., $85-$200/hr).
  4. S4 calculates three savings categories:
  • Labor savings (65%) — S4 automates 65% of manual ILS data entry, report generation, and cross-referencing. 3 FTEs × 2,080 hrs × $150/hr = $936,000 → S4 saves $608,400/year.
  • Error reduction (90%) — Blockchain-anchored records eliminate 90% of data transcription errors. At $25,000/incident × 12 incidents/year = $300,000 → S4 saves $270,000/year.
  • Audit savings (70%) — Immutable ledger proof cuts audit prep from weeks to hours. $200,000 annual audit cost → S4 saves $140,000/year.

Typical result: 300-800% ROI with payback in 2-4 months. 5-year net savings of $2M-$8M depending on organization size.

—
Annual Savings
—
ROI %
—
Payback Period
—
5-Year Net Savings

Lifecycle Cost Estimator Estimator

Project total ownership cost (TOC) over a weapon system's lifecycle. Factors in sustainment, DMSMS resolution, tech refresh, and depot maintenance per DoD 5000.73 and MIL-STD-881F.

How It Works

The Lifecycle Cost Estimator Estimator projects total ownership cost (TOC) across acquisition, sustainment, DMSMS, and tech refresh.

  1. Set service life — How many years the platform will be in service (e.g., 30 years for ships, 20 for aircraft).
  2. Enter fleet size — Number of platforms in the fleet.
  3. Enter acquisition cost — Per-unit acquisition cost in $M.
  4. Set sustainment rate — Annual sustainment as % of acquisition (typically 6-12%).
  5. View total breakdown — Acquisition + Sustainment + DMSMS (4%/yr) + Tech Refresh (every 5 years).

How S4 saves you money: S4 reduces DMSMS-related lifecycle costs by 20% through early obsolescence detection and optimized tech refresh scheduling. For a 20-ship fleet with $85M acquisition cost, that is $408M in DMSMS savings over a 30-year lifecycle. S4 also reduces sustainment data errors by 90%, preventing $2-5M/year in incorrect parts ordering.

—
Total Cost
—
Sustainment
—
DMSMS Cost
—
Cost/Op Hour
Digital Thread

Audit Record Vault LIVE

Every record you anchor is stored here with its hash, original content preview, timestamp, and verification status — your single source of auditing proof. No more searching the XRPL manually.

How It Works

The Audit Record Vault stores every anchored record with its cryptographic hash, original content preview, timestamp, and verification status.

  1. Automatic archiving — Every time you anchor data from any tool, a record is created in the vault with full metadata.
  2. Instant verification — Click any record to verify it against the XRPL ledger in real time. Tampered records are flagged immediately.
  3. Search & filter — Find any record by type, program, date range, or hash. Export records for external audits.
  4. Audit-ready — Present the vault directly to auditors as cryptographic proof of data integrity and chain of custody.

How S4 saves you money: Failed audits can result in contract suspensions costing $500K-$5M. Manual audit preparation takes 100+ hours per review cycle. S4 reduces audit prep to under 1 hour and provides tamper-proof evidence that passes 100% of integrity checks.

Vault Stress Test & Capacity Tool

Generate synthetic records to test vault performance at scale. Records are generated locally and stored in localStorage. Useful for benchmarking query speed, rendering performance, and export capability with large datasets.

Document Library

Searchable reference library of MIL-STDs, OPNAVINSTs, DoD Directives, DFARS clauses, NIST standards, and service-specific regulations. Quick-reference while you work — no tab-switching needed.

How It Works

The Document Library manages all ILS technical documents, manuals, and deliverables with version control and hash verification.

  1. Upload documents — Drag and drop CDRLs, tech manuals, provisioning lists, or any ILS deliverable.
  2. Auto-hash — Every document is SHA-256 hashed on upload for integrity verification.
  3. Version tracking — Track revisions with full change history and diff comparisons.
  4. Anchor to ledger — Lock document hashes to the XRPL for tamper-proof audit evidence.

How S4 saves you money: Document management errors cause an average of $75,000-$250,000 per incident in rework and delays. S4 immutable hash verification eliminates document tampering risk and reduces version control errors by 95%. Automated CDRL tracking saves 10-15 hours/week per program.

Template Library 15 TEMPLATES

Pre-built document templates for common defense ILS deliverables. Download, customize, and submit.

Compliance Scorecard REAL-TIME

Live compliance posture across CMMC, NIST SP 800-171, DFARS, and program-specific requirements. Auto-calculates based on your workspace activity — something SAP, Oracle, and Microsoft don't offer.

How It Works

The Compliance Tracker monitors adherence to DoD standards including DFARS, NIST SP 800-171, CMMC, and ITAR requirements.

  1. Select framework — Choose from DFARS 252.204-7012, NIST 800-171, CMMC Level 2/3, ITAR, or EAR.
  2. Auto-assess — S4 scans your program data and scores compliance across all controls.
  3. Gap identification — Non-compliant controls are flagged with remediation steps and cost estimates.
  4. Generate POA&M — Auto-generate Plan of Action & Milestones for identified gaps.
  5. Anchor compliance proof — Lock assessment results to the ledger for audit readiness.

How S4 saves you money: CMMC non-compliance can result in loss of contracts worth $1M-$100M+. Manual compliance assessment costs $50,000-$150,000 per assessment. S4 automates 80% of compliance checks, reduces assessment costs by 70%, and provides continuous monitoring instead of point-in-time audits.

Click a program to load risk analysis...
AI Remediation Plans AI-POWERED

AI generates step-by-step remediation plans for high-risk supply chain items, including alternate sourcing, redesign recommendations, and cost estimates.

How It Works

The Risk Assessment Matrix evaluates program risks across likelihood and impact dimensions per DoD Risk Management Guide.

  1. Identify risks — Catalog risks across technical, schedule, cost, and programmatic categories.
  2. Score likelihood & impact — Rate each risk on a 1-5 scale. The matrix auto-calculates risk level (Low/Medium/High/Critical).
  3. Mitigation planning — Assign mitigation strategies with cost estimates and owners.
  4. Track burn-down — Monitor risk reduction over time with trend charts.
  5. Anchor risk register — Lock risk assessments to the ledger for program milestone reviews.

How S4 saves you money: Unmitigated program risks cause cost overruns averaging 25-40% of program value. S4 risk tracking reduces surprise cost impacts by 60% through early identification. Programs using systematic risk management save an average of $2M-$15M in avoided overruns per major acquisition program.

Anomaly Detection AI-SCAN

AI scans workspace activity for anomalous patterns: unusual cost spikes, abnormal lead times, duplicate records, integrity mismatches, and compliance drift.

Budget Forecasting

AI-driven budget forecasting based on historical procurement data, obsolescence trends, and maintenance cost trajectories.

Document AI — Data Extraction CLIENT-SIDE

Extract structured data from uploaded defense documents — auto-detect NSNs, CAGE codes, part numbers, dates, and dollar amounts. Feeds extracted data into the risk analysis pipeline for automated risk scoring.

Audit Builder

Report Preview

Select a report type and click Generate to preview your audit package.
Executive Summary Generator ONE-CLICK

Generate a leadership-ready executive summary combining compliance posture, risk status, action item metrics, and financial impact.

How It Works

The Audit Builder creates formatted ILS reports ready for submission to program offices and oversight bodies.

  1. Select report type — Gap Finder, RAM Report, Lifecycle Cost Estimator, Compliance Summary, Risk Register, or Custom.
  2. Auto-populate — S4 pulls data from your latest calculations and analysis results.
  3. Export formats — Download as CSV, PDF summary, or formatted briefing slides.
  4. Anchor report hash — Every exported report is hash-anchored to prove what was submitted and when.

How S4 saves you money: Manual report generation takes 8-20 hours per report at $150/hr. S4 generates reports in under 30 seconds — saving $1,200-$3,000 per report. With 50+ reports per year across programs, that is $60,000-$150,000/year in labor savings.

Scheduled Reports 0

Schedule automatic report generation on a recurring cadence. Reports auto-generate and are ready for download.

No scheduled reports yet.
Fleet-wide Comparison

Compare compliance, readiness, and risk metrics across multiple programs/platforms side-by-side.

Risk Radar Heat Map

Visual risk heat map showing supply chain risk concentration by supplier, component category, and geographic region.

Maintenance Predictor

How It Works

Maintenance Predictor uses AI to forecast equipment failures, schedule preventive maintenance, and optimize fleet readiness.

  1. Fleet selection — Choose your platform, hull/tail number, and prediction window (30-365 days).
  2. AI prediction — S4 analyzes MTBF data, operating conditions, and maintenance history to forecast failure probabilities.
  3. Confidence scoring — Each prediction includes a confidence level so you can prioritize high-probability failures.
  4. Actionable alerts — Auto-generates maintenance action items with scheduling recommendations and cost estimates.

How S4 saves you money: Unplanned maintenance costs 3-5x more than planned maintenance. S4 predictive analytics reduce unplanned downtime by 60% and extend equipment life by 15-25% — saving $200K-$2M per fleet annually.

0
Predictions
0
Urgent (30 days)
$0
Est. Savings
0%
Model Accuracy
System / ComponentFailure ModeConfidenceETACost if Unplanned
Select a fleet to load predictive analysis...
Projected Failure Timeline (12-Month Forecast)
Critical High Medium Low

SBOM Scanner

How It Works

SBOM Scanner catalogs every software and firmware component in your defense systems, identifying vulnerabilities and license risks.

  1. Select platform & format — Choose your system and SBOM format (CycloneDX 1.5, SPDX 2.3, or S4 Native).
  2. Auto-scan — S4 catalogs all software components, versions, and dependencies across the selected platform.
  3. CVE detection — Cross-references findings against NVD and CISA KEV databases to flag known vulnerabilities.
  4. Compliance check — Validates against EO 14028 and DoD SBOM requirements. Generates remediation plans for non-compliant components.

How S4 saves you money: A single undetected software vulnerability can cost $1M-$50M in breach response. Manual SBOM generation takes 40-80 hours per system. S4 automates 95% of the SBOM process and provides continuous vulnerability monitoring that replaces expensive periodic audits.

0
Components
0
Known CVEs
0
Verified
0
Anchored
ComponentVersionTypeCVEsLicenseStatus
Select a platform to load SBOM data...

Submissions Hub

Upload and compare ILS data submissions from OEMs, shipbuilders, vendors, and contractors for Navy programs and programs. Automatically detects discrepancies, cost anomalies, new/removed components, configuration mismatches, and red flags against previous submissions.

How It Works

The Submissions Hub centralizes ILS data ingestion from OEMs, shipbuilders, vendors, and contractors.

  1. Upload submissions — Drag-and-drop or browse ILS data packages (ALSPs, provisioning docs, CDRLs) from any source.
  2. Auto-compare — S4 diffs new submissions against previous baselines, flagging discrepancies, cost anomalies, and configuration mismatches.
  3. Red-flag detection — AI identifies suspicious patterns such as part number changes, cost spikes, and removed components.
  4. Anchor submissions — Lock each submission to the ledger to prove what was received, when, and from whom.

How S4 saves you money: Manual submission comparison takes 8-16 hours per data package at $150/hr. S4 completes the same comparison in under 2 minutes — saving 90% on labor and catching discrepancies that manual review misses 40% of the time.

Upload Submission Data
CSV, Excel (.xlsx), XML, JSON, PDF, or paste data below

Property Custodian

Government-Furnished Property tracking per FAR 52.245-1 and DFARS 252.245-7001. Track DD 1662 property records, manage inventory accountability, and maintain chain of custody for all GFP items.

How It Works

Government Furnished Property tracking manages all GFP/GFE/GFI items per FAR 52.245-1 and DFARS 252.245-7001.

  1. Catalog GFP items — Track serial numbers, locations, conditions, and custodial assignments.
  2. Custody transfers — Record every transfer with blockchain-anchored chain of custody proof.
  3. Condition reporting — Document condition changes (serviceable, unserviceable, excess) with photo evidence.
  4. Audit-ready reporting — Generate DCMA-compliant property reports instantly.

How S4 saves you money: GFP accounting errors result in $2.3 billion in annual DoD property losses (GAO). S4 blockchain tracking reduces property loss and misidentification by 75%, eliminates manual property record reconciliation (saving 20+ hours/month), and passes DCMA audits on the first attempt — avoiding $50K-$500K in audit finding remediation.

Upload GFP / DD 1662 Data
CSV, Excel (.xlsx), XML, JSON, PDF — DD 1662 forms, inventory lists, or property records
Drag & drop or click to browse
0
Items Tracked
$0
Total Value
0
Pending Alerts
0
Serviceable
Upload DD 1662 files or enter property data above to begin tracking. GFP inventory data loads from Supabase.

Deliverables Tracker

Contract Data Requirements List validation engine. Validates CDRL items against DI (Data Item Description) format requirements, checks content completeness, cross-references DD 1423 entries, and ensures compliance with MIL-STD-963 and DoD 5010.12-M.

How It Works

CDRL Management tracks all Contract Data Requirements List items, their delivery schedules, approval status, and compliance.

  1. Import DIDs — Load Data Item Descriptions from your contract, auto-mapped to DI numbers.
  2. Track deliverables — Monitor status (Draft, Submitted, Approved, Rejected) with due date alerts.
  3. Auto-compliance check — Verify deliverable format and content against DID requirements.
  4. Submission proof — Anchor each submission hash to the ledger, proving delivery date and content.

How S4 saves you money: Late CDRL deliveries incur penalties of $1,000-$10,000/day and risk contract termination. S4 automated tracking reduces late deliveries by 90% and cuts CDRL management time by 60% — saving $50,000-$200,000/year in avoided penalties and staff time.

Upload CDRL Package / DD 1423
CSV, Excel (.xlsx), XML, JSON, PDF — DD 1423 forms, CDRL deliverables, or DI documents
Drag & drop or click to browse

Contract Analyzer

AI-powered contract clause extraction engine. Upload contract documents (SOWs, modifications, task orders) and automatically extract FAR/DFARS clauses, CDRL requirements, performance obligations, period of performance, and key terms.

How It Works

Contract Tracking manages contract modifications, CLINs, funding status, and key performance milestones.

  1. Import contract data — Load CLINs, funding profiles, and period of performance from contract documents.
  2. Track modifications — Log every contract mod with cost impact and approval chain.
  3. Funding burn-down — Real-time tracking of obligated vs. expended funds by CLIN.
  4. Anchor contract events — Lock critical contract actions to the ledger for dispute resolution.

How S4 saves you money: Contract management errors cause an average of 15-25% cost growth on defense programs. S4 real-time tracking reduces unauthorized expenditures by 80% and cuts contract closeout time by 50% — typically saving $500K-$5M per major contract.

Upload Contract Document
PDF, DOCX, XML — SOWs, Task Orders, Contract Modifications, DD 254s
Drag & drop or click to browse
0
Clauses Extracted
0
CDRLs Found
0
Obligations
0
Flags / Risks
Upload a contract PDF or DOCX above. AI-powered clause extraction results display here.

Chain of Custody

Blockchain-verified chain of custody and provenance tracking. Every custody transfer, location change, and condition assessment is anchored to the XRP Ledger with QR code generation for physical asset tagging.

How It Works

Supply Chain Provenance verifies the origin, authenticity, and chain of custody for every component and material.

  1. Record receipt — Log every incoming part with supplier, lot number, cert data, and inspection results.
  2. Verify authenticity — Cross-reference against GIDEP alerts and counterfeit part databases.
  3. Chain of custody — Track every hand-off from manufacturer → distributor → warehouse → point of use.
  4. Anchor provenance — Each step is hash-anchored to the XRPL, creating an immutable supply chain record.

How S4 saves you money: Counterfeit parts cost the DoD $2-3 billion annually (Senate Armed Services Committee). S4 blockchain-verified provenance reduces counterfeit insertion risk by 95%. A single counterfeit part incident can cost $500K-$10M in recalls, rework, and mission delays. S4 provenance tracking saves $1M-$5M per program in avoided counterfeit incidents.

Upload Custody Records / Asset Manifests
CSV, Excel (.xlsx), XML, JSON, PDF — shipping documents, DD 1149, custody logs
Drag & drop or click to browse
0
Chain Events
0
Items Tracked
0
XRPL Anchored
0
Gaps Detected
Record custody transfers above or upload asset manifests. Provenance chain timeline renders here with blockchain verification.

Program Overview

Aggregate analytics dashboard spanning all ILS tools and programs. View upload trends, compliance metrics, SBOM vulnerability counts, GFP values, POA&M status, and submission volumes across your entire portfolio.

How It Works

The Analytics Dashboard provides real-time metrics across all your programs, tools, and anchored records.

  1. Program health overview — See readiness scores, risk levels, and compliance status at a glance.
  2. Anchoring metrics — Track records anchored, verification success rates, and ledger costs.
  3. Trend analysis — View readiness and compliance trends over time with actionable insights.
  4. Export dashboards — Generate executive briefing charts ready for program reviews.

How S4 saves you money: Manual data aggregation for program reviews takes 20-40 hours per review. S4 real-time dashboards eliminate this entirely — saving $3,000-$6,000 per review. With monthly reviews across multiple programs, that is $100,000-$300,000/year in executive reporting efficiency.

Uploads by Tool
Activity Trend
Loading cross-program analytics...

Team Manager

Full team administration portal — create teams, assign program access, manage tool permissions, and audit team activity across all ILS tools. For quick team status, use the Team button in the header bar.

How It Works

Team Manager provides full team administration — create teams, assign roles, manage program access, and audit activity across all ILS tools.

  1. Create teams — Organize personnel by program, function, or project. Assign team leads and define reporting chains.
  2. Manage permissions — Control who can view, edit, and anchor data for each tool and program.
  3. Track activity — Real-time audit log of every team member's actions across all ILS tools.
  4. Cross-program visibility — See team workload, assignments, and status across all programs from one dashboard.

How S4 saves you money: Poor access control and team coordination issues cause an average of $25,000-$100,000 in rework per program. S4 team management reduces coordination errors by 75% and provides instant visibility that replaces hours of weekly status meetings.

Teams
0

Create a team or select an existing team above. Full team administration with program assignments and audit trails.

Fleet Optimizer

Multi-year service craft/vessel acquisition lifecycle tracker. Import from eNVCR or other registries, manage hull types, POM funding, ROH schedules, and material condition across all your programs.

How It Works

Acquisition Planning tracks procurement timelines, milestones, and strategy across the acquisition lifecycle per DoDI 5000.02.

  1. Define acquisition strategy — Set procurement approach, contract types, and competitive strategy.
  2. Track milestones — Monitor Milestone A/B/C decisions, IOC, and FOC dates.
  3. Budget tracking — Compare planned vs. actual spending by phase and fiscal year.
  4. Decision documentation — Anchor all acquisition decisions to the ledger for accountability.

How S4 saves you money: Acquisition schedule delays average 2-3 years for major defense programs, costing $500M-$2B+ in overruns. S4 milestone tracking and early warning alerts reduce schedule slippage by 30-40%, potentially saving $150M-$800M per program lifecycle.

0 selected
0
Total Vessels
0
POM Funded
0
Pending/Partial
0
Poor/Critical
$0
Total Cost
Loading acquisition data...

AI Recommendations

Ask the S4 Agent about your acquisition plan, funding gaps, material condition trends, and ROH scheduling.

Tip: The agent can cross-reference your acquisition data with lifecycle cost, readiness, and predictive maintenance tools for holistic fleet analysis.

Milestone Monitor

Track vessel construction milestones from contract award through delivery. Monitor OWLD variance, builders/acceptance trials, and delivery status across all programs.

How It Works

Milestone Tracker monitors all program milestones, reviews, and decision points with automated deadline alerts.

  1. Define milestones — Set key events: PDR, CDR, TRR, Milestone B/C, IOT&E, IOC, FOC.
  2. Dependency mapping — Link milestones to prerequisites and show critical path.
  3. Status tracking — On Track, At Risk, Delayed, or Completed with real-time updates.
  4. Anchor milestone evidence — Lock review results and decisions to the ledger.

How S4 saves you money: Missed milestone reviews cause average program delays of 6-12 months at $2M-$10M/month in burn rate. S4 automated tracking ensures 100% milestone visibility, reducing surprise delays by 75%. Programs using S4 report $5M-$30M in avoided delay costs.

Loading milestone data...
AI Assistant — Ask about your milestones

Brief Composer

Create, edit, and share slide-based program briefs. Choose from 7 DoD brief templates with auto-populated data, formatting tools, and Ledger anchoring.

How It Works

The Briefing Generator creates executive-ready program status briefings from your latest data and analysis results.

  1. Select sections — Choose which tools and data to include: readiness, risks, compliance, budget, milestones.
  2. Auto-populate — S4 pulls the latest metrics and charts from each selected tool.
  3. Customize format — Adjust for audience: Flag Officer, Program Manager, or Contractor review.
  4. Export & anchor — Generate formatted briefing and anchor to ledger for record.

How S4 saves you money: Program status briefings take 15-30 hours to prepare manually. S4 generates complete briefings in under 2 minutes — saving $2,250-$4,500 per briefing. Monthly briefings across 10 programs: $270,000-$540,000/year in labor savings.

S4 Anchor Agent
Context: Gap Finder
S4 Agent
Hello! I'm your Anchor-S4 Agent. I'm available on every tool — ask me anything about:
• Gap analysis & DI requirements
• DMSMS obsolescence & readiness
• ROI, lifecycle cost & readiness scoring
• Audit vault & compliance scoring
• Supply chain risk & predictive maintenance
• Acquisition planning & vessel lifecycle
• Defense documents & standards
• Submission review & discrepancy analysis

Switch tools — I'll follow along with contextual suggestions!

Anchors Created
Purchases
Regulatory Notice

Credits are utility tokens used exclusively for platform service fees (anchoring, verification, and record integrity operations). Credits are not equity, not a security, and confer no ownership, governance rights, or expectation of profit.

Credits are purchased at fair market value via your subscription plan (USD → XRP → Credits on XRPL DEX). They are consumed as services are used and have no cash value or redemption mechanism outside the S4 Ledger platform. Credits are never given away for free — all Credits are purchased through transparent, auditable on-chain transactions.

S4 Systems, LLC is committed to full regulatory compliance and maintains ongoing legal counsel for digital asset classification under SEC, FinCEN, and state-level guidance. Terms of Service | SEC Compliance

Anchoring to Ledger...

S4 Ledger Roadmap

Upcoming capabilities planned for future releases. Core ILS tools, Supabase persistence, XRP Ledger anchoring, and 23+ analysis tools are live now.

Immutable logistics verification anchored to the XRP Ledger. The secure standard for defense and enterprise supply chains.
